title: polyadenia puberula
intro: Polyadenia puberula, also known as rough-leaved polyadenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Polyadenia puberula include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
